#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
};

NetworkPacket deserialize_packet(std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::span<const uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::deserializer<hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::span<const uint8_t>>> deserializer(adaptor);

    NetworkPacket packet;

    deserializer >> packet.packet_id;
    deserializer >> hexi::prefixed(packet.username);

    uint32_t score_count;
    deserializer >> score_count;

    hexi::read_container(deserializer, packet.scores, score_count);

    deserializer >> hexi::null_terminated(packet.metadata);

    auto bytes_read = deserializer.total_read();
    auto remaining_bytes = buffer.size() - bytes_read;
    if (remaining_bytes > 0) {
        deserializer.skip(remaining_bytes);
    }

    return packet;
}

struct PacketInfo {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string_view username;
};

PacketInfo extract_packet_info(std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::span<const uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::deserializer<hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::span<const uint8_t>>> deserializer(adaptor);

    info.packet_id = packet_id_span[0];

    std::string_view username;
    deserializer >> hexi::prefixed(username);
    info.username = username;

    uint32_t score_count;
    deserializer >> score_count;
    deserializer.skip(score_count * sizeof(uint32_t));

    return info;
}
```

#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <filesystem>

uint32_t read_uint32_from_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {

    uint32_t value;
    buffer.read(value);
    return value;
}

void write_uint32_to_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, uint32_t value) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path);
    buffer.write(value);
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void skip_bytes_in_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::size_t bytes) {
    buffer.skip(bytes);
}

struct MessageHeader {
    uint16_t message_type;
    uint32_t body_length;
};

MessageHeader read_header_and_skip_body(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    MessageHeader header;
    buffer.read(&header, sizeof(header));
    buffer.skip(header.body_length);
    return header;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

using namespace hexi::detail;

template<typename T>
std::size_t encode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, T value) {
    return write_varint<T>(writer, value);
}

template<typename T>
T decode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    return read_varint<T>(reader);
}

template<typename T>
bool encode_decode_roundtrip(T original_value) {
    // Create a buffer to hold the encoded data
    std::vector<std::uint8_t> buffer;
    
    // Create a buffer adaptor for the buffer
    hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);
    
    // Create a writer and reader using the adaptor
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer writer(adaptor);
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader reader(adaptor);
    
    // Encode the original value
    encode_varint(writer, original_value);
    
    // Create a new adaptor for the same buffer to read from the beginning
    hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::uint8_t>> read_adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader reader2(read_adaptor);
    
    // Decode the value
    T decoded_value = decode_varint(reader2);
    
    // Compare with the original value
    return decoded_value == original_value;
}
